'''Hurnoj Arqu'uthun''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] who protected his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Thule/Legends|Thule]], in the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]]. He was very loyal and wanted to make the innocent's casualties to its least. He seemed to be able to withstand the continual onslaught of [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] energy.
